summary: Complete frontend testing of new HomePage super-app layout. All 13 features tested and working correctly. Login redirects to new HomePage, bottom navigation with 4 tabs (Mobilidade, Lojas, Serviços, Finanças) works properly, all UI elements and navigation tested successfully.

minor.issue: Backend v2.38.46 vs Frontend v2.38.50 - minor version sync issue (non-blocking)

critical_code_review_comments: ✅ HomePage component properly implements super-app layout with 4 tabs
✅ All data-testid attributes correctly placed for testing
✅ White-label support maintained via franquiaContext prop
✅ Map component uses simulated canvas-based map with animated car icons (not Google Maps)
✅ Hamburger menu shows correct items based on user_type (labelview_unidade)
✅ Balance display shows actual user balance (R$ 47.60) from API
context_for_next_testing_agent: HomePage at '/' route fully tested. All 4 tabs working: Mobilidade (map, passenger/driver toggle, quick actions), Lojas (search, categories, empty state), Serviços (6 category cards, providers section), Finanças (balance card, quick actions, navigation). Use mobile viewport 420x900 for testing.

features_tested.login_redirect: ✅ PASS - Login with transmillapp@gmail.com/demo123 redirects to HomePage at '/'

bottom_navigation.mobilidade_tab: ✅ PASS - data-testid='nav-mobility' clickable and switches content
bottom_navigation.lojas_tab: ✅ PASS - data-testid='nav-marketplace' clickable and switches content
bottom_navigation.servicos_tab: ✅ PASS - data-testid='nav-services' clickable and switches content
bottom_navigation.financas_tab: ✅ PASS - data-testid='nav-finance' clickable and switches content
bottom_navigation.active_indicator: ✅ PASS - Active tab shows indicator bar at top

mobility_tab_content.map_area: ✅ PASS - Simulated map with animated car icons displayed
mobility_tab_content.passenger_driver_toggle: ✅ PASS - Toggle works, changes search text (Para onde vamos? ↔ Começar a dirigir)
mobility_tab_content.destination_search: ✅ PASS - 'Para onde vamos?' search button visible and clickable
mobility_tab_content.acesso_rapido: ✅ PASS - Section with Última corrida, Eventos, Meus pedidos visible

lojas_tab_content.category_chips: ✅ PASS - Todas, Alimentação, Moda, Eletrônicos, Saúde visible
lojas_tab_content.empty_state: ✅ PASS - Shows 'Nenhuma loja disponível no momento' (expected for this franchise)

servicos_tab_content.category_grid: ✅ PASS - 6 category cards displayed (Manutenção, Profissionais, Proteção, Saúde, Tecnologia, Suporte)
servicos_tab_content.prestadores_section: ✅ PASS - 'Prestadores próximos' section with 'Ver todos' link
servicos_tab_content.empty_state: ✅ PASS - Shows 'Nenhum prestador disponível' (expected for this franchise)

financas_tab_content.balance_card: ✅ PASS - Shows 'Saldo disponível: R$ 47,60' with USDT: 0.0000
financas_tab_content.toggle_visibility: ✅ PASS - Eye icon toggles balance visibility

header_elements.user_avatar: ✅ PASS - data-testid='user-avatar-btn' present, shows user initial 'T'
header_elements.notification_bell: ✅ PASS - Notification bell with badge visible

notes.map_implementation: The map in Mobility tab is a SIMULATED canvas-based map with animated car icons, NOT Google Maps. This is by design as mentioned in the review request.
notes.empty_states: Lojas and Serviços tabs show empty states because there's no data for this franchise - this is expected behavior.
notes.white_labeling: App uses Transmill branding with primary blue color #005B9C - white-label support is maintained via franquiaContext prop.
